info.name: Stone Academy Admin Backend – Admin APIs
info.description: Postman collection for the Stone Academy Admin Backend covering all protected admin modules.

item.name: Admin Auth
item.description: Authentication and profile management endpoints for admin users.

item.name: POST /admin/login

request.description: Authenticate an admin using email/password and receive access/refresh tokens.

response.name: 200 Success

originalRequest.description: Authenticate an admin using email/password and receive access/refresh tokens.

response.name: 400 Error

originalRequest.description: Authenticate an admin using email/password and receive access/refresh tokens.

item.description: Authenticate an admin using email/password and receive access/refresh tokens.

item.name: POST /admin/logout

request.description: Invalidate the current session refresh token and revoke access.

response.name: 200 Success

originalRequest.description: Invalidate the current session refresh token and revoke access.

response.name: 400 Error

originalRequest.description: Invalidate the current session refresh token and revoke access.

item.description: Invalidate the current session refresh token and revoke access.
